title: FAMILY CONNECTS - 211info
text: LINN COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH SWEET HOME FAMILY CONNECTS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF A nurse visiting program that offers up to four scheduled nurse visits to support families with a newborn. Provides overall health checks, help with feeding and bathing, and support for birthing parents with postpartum depression. Nurses also help connect families with community resources to promote parents’ health and children’s well-being. 799 Long Street Sweet Home, OR 97386 Eligibility: Birth, adoptive, or resource families with a newborn 0-12 weeks Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (541) 967-3888 2489 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 967-3888 ext 2489 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call, email, or visit the website for information or to request a visit if one was not set up at the hospital. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Linn County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located near the intersection of Highway 20 and Highway 228 in Sweet Home past the East Linn Museum and across from the Sweet Home Inn. Services: Breastfeeding Support Programs General Expectant/New Parent Assistance Prenatal/Postnatal Home Visitation Programs Teen Expectant/New Parent Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - BABIES FIRST! PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - WOMEN, INFANTS, AND CHILDREN SUPPLEMENTAL NUTRITION PROGRAM SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - TUBERCULOSIS PROGRAM SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - VACCINES AND IMMUNIZATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LINN COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH SWEET HOME
